rationale: The cited paper is used to define and operationalize the core mediator, engagement, as attention reflected in gaze duration and refixations. This citation appears in the conceptual framework and again in Study 5 to justify the eye-tracking based engagement measure, so it supports hypothesis logic and measurement choice rather than serving as a generic background mention. Although cited alongside Pieters and Wedel, it plays a clear functional role in how the citing paper measures engagement.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Teixeira et al.'s engagement-as-attention conceptualization to a new context (static logo dynamism), using it to motivate engagement hypotheses and eye-tracking metrics (fixation duration and refixations).
